narrative:
Jackson Twp township has 2,591 registered voters, with 51.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.8 percentage points.
